product_overview: DoctorFit is a customizable e-commerce storefront where users can browse products, manage a shopping cart, and complete purchases. The app also supports account login and registration for a more personalized shopping experience.
core_goals: Create and manage a shopping cart
Register for an account and log in
Proceed to checkout to place an order

features.name: Browse Products
features.description: Users can explore products from the homepage or product listing page and narrow results using categories, search, and price filters.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View featured products and categories -> Open the product listing page -> Select a category to narrow results -> Adjust search or price filters -> See the updated product list
Navigate to /shop/products -> Change search or price filters -> See the product list update
Navigate to / -> Select a category card -> See products filtered by category

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Users can add products to the cart, review cart contents, adjust quantities, remove items, and see the subtotal before checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop/products -> Add a product to the cart -> Open the cart page -> Review cart items and subtotal
Navigate to /shop/cart -> Increase or decrease an item quantity -> See the cart total recalculate
Navigate to /shop/cart -> Remove an item from the cart -> See the cart update

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can create an account and sign in with email and password to access authenticated shopping features.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth/register -> Fill in registration details -> Submit the registration form -> See the account created confirmation
Navigate to /auth/login -> Fill in email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the authenticated session begin
Navigate to /auth/login -> Enter invalid email or password format -> Submit the login form -> See validation feedback

features.name: Checkout
features.description: Authenticated users can enter shipping details and payment information to complete an order.
user_flows: Navigate to /shop/cart -> Proceed to checkout -> Fill in shipping details -> Enter payment information -> Submit the order -> See order completion confirmation

routes.description: Homepage showing promo banners, categories grid, featured products, and testimonials.
Checkout page for entering shipping details and payment.

features.name: Browse Products
features.description: Users can view products on the homepage and filter products on the shop page.
user_interactions: Click category card to filter products
Change search input or price filters

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Users can add products to cart, update quantities, and view cart subtotal.
user_interactions: Click Add to Cart button on product card

features.name: User Authentication
user_interactions: Fill email and password input fields
